findings.description: Both s3 and s5 contain only "なし" (2 characters), well below the 50-character threshold. These sections have no corresponding content in the source file and appear to be extraneous. The source has two h2 sections (基本構造, 使用例) plus an introductory block — there is no source content that maps to s3 or s5.
findings.source_evidence: Source file contains only: intro block (→ s1), 基本構造 section (→ s2), and 使用例 section (→ s4). No content exists for s3 or s5.

findings.description: The s4 section covers the usage example code, but hints are missing three API method names used prominently in the code examples: `createFormatter`, `hasNext`, and `initialize`. These are callable methods on `FormatterFactory` and `DataRecordFormatter` that a developer would search for.

The format definition file code example omits the section-header comments (`# ディレクティブ定義部` and `# データレコード定義部`) that appear in the source. These comments convey the two-part structure of format definition files (a directive section and a data record section), which is structural information useful for understanding how to author such files.
findings.source_evidence:
Source code block:
```
#
# ディレクティブ定義部
#
file-type: ...

#
# データレコード定義部
#
[Default]
```
